title: The Housekeeper's Daughter
writer: Rian James, Gordon Douglas, Donald Henderson Clarke
actors: Joan Bennett, Adolphe Menjou, John Hubbard
plot: There is the murder of a gangster. His girlfriend goes to stay with her mother. The mother is the housekeeper of an upper middle-class family with an attractive son. The gangster's gang follows the girl, and the police pursue the ...
